parsed.availability_comment: Retained by GT and listed in current IPL 2026 squad pages, but pre-IPL fitness trail is not fully clean.

parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; no overseas-slot issue. Competition is from GT’s Indian spin/all-round options and pace-heavy combinations.
